This 2026 season we will be present in one of the most emblematic spaces on the island: Las Dalias Ibiza. We will have an exclusive exhibition and sales stand where you can discover our creations up close, get to know our essence and take a unique piece with you.

We invite you to visit us, enjoy the unmistakable atmosphere of Las Dalias and connect with our work in an environment full of art, culture and energy.

97667bfd718b8149967748dda98b825f:
"Fight for your goals, do not give up and show yourself that you are able to overcome any challenge."


This sculpture pays tribute to the spirit of self-improvement, perseverance and inner strength of those who face adversity without giving up. He represents a great fighter, a symbol of perseverance, discipline and courage in the face of every obstacle.
ecbdbd8d7666a2a7b7057c3e42653a64: The figure symbolizes the guide who does not impose, but accompanies; who does not mold, but inspires. Each stroke suggests hours of invisible effort, shared knowledge and deep-rooted vocation. It shows the tension between discipline and sensitivity, between demand and care, qualities that define the true educator. This sculpture is a one of one.
